title: Bridge Essay: The Neural Underpinnings of Aphantasia: A Case Study of Identical Twins.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Imaginal — mental imagery as real perception, imagination activating sensory cortices, aphantasia.

**The Neural Underpinnings of Aphantasia: A Case Study of Identical Twins.**. bioRxiv.. PMID: 39386622. DOI: 10.1101/2024.09.23.614521. Aphantasia is acondition characterized by reduced voluntary mental imagery. As this lack of mental imagery disrupts visual memory, understanding the nature of this condition can provide important insight into memory, perception, and imagery. Here, we leveraged the power of case studies to better characterize this condition by running apair of identical twins, one with aphantasia and one without, through mental imagery tasks in an fMRI scanner.
